description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical lotion tube with a smooth, white body and a contrasting red cap at the base. The tube tapers gently towards the top, ending in a narrow, rounded tip, typical for squeeze-dispensed products. The cap is flat and circular, likely made of plastic, and provides a stable base for the tube to stand upright. The surface of the tube is plain, with no visible branding, text, or decorative graphics. The overall finish is sleek and slightly glossy, suggesting a clean and modern design. The object appears lightweight and portable, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A white, cylindrical lotion tube with a red flat cap and a smooth, glossy finish. The design is plain and modern, with no visible branding or graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full white body of the tube and the red cap, with a smooth, unmarked surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the tube's tapering profile and the pointed tip, with the red cap visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, showing the plain white body and red cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the tapering shape and pointed tip, mirroring view 1.
